caveats: Metrics are Swimmy in-sample/backtest values; re-validate before treating as edge.
Some A/S/B entries are test artifacts (see likely_test_artifact flag).
timeframe_minutes for legacy reversion legends may be stored in seconds (e.g. 300=M5).
entry/exit use Swimmy DSL; see README glossary for operator semantics.

strategies.name: BB-Squeeze-Expansion
strategies.entry_pseudo: (CLOSE crosses above BB-UPPER AND CLOSE > SMA-20)

strategies.name: Bladerunner
strategies.entry_pseudo: (CLOSE > EMA-20 AND LOW crosses above EMA-20)

strategies.name: Crossover-Plus-MACD
strategies.entry_pseudo: (EMA-10 crosses above EMA-20 AND MACD-LINE > SIGNAL-LINE)

strategies.name: Holy-Grail-Proxy
strategies.entry_pseudo: (CLOSE > SMA-50 AND CLOSE crosses above EMA-20)

strategies.name: Bred-Bred--261-Gen36-N3980242439-83
strategies.entry_lisp: (OR (AND (> CLOSE SMA-20) (> SMA-20 SMA-50) (> RSI 55)) (AND (< CLOSE SMA-20) (< SMA-20 SMA-50) (< RSI 45)))
strategies.entry_pseudo: ((CLOSE > SMA-20 AND SMA-20 > SMA-50 AND RSI > 55) OR (CLOSE < SMA-20 AND SMA-20 < SMA-50 AND RSI < 45))
